## Current Architecture

ROOT's current agent architecture is flat, with agents handling various tasks independently.

## Hierarchical Proposal

A hierarchical agent architecture could improve ROOT's adaptability to complex situations and reduce decision-making time by delegating sub-tasks to specialized agents.
